<!--
Thanks for contributing to SwiftGPX!

Please make sure your PR meets these expectations before requesting review:
- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `## [Unreleased]`
- [ ] New public API has Sendable + Codable + Equatable conformance (or a documented reason it can't)
- [ ] Round-trip test added if you changed any parser/serializer behaviour
- [ ] `swift test` passes locally on macOS

If your change is bigger than a bug fix, please open an issue first so we can
agree on the approach.
-->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 bullets describing the change and the why. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Documentation / chore

## Related issue

<!-- Closes #123 -->

## Test plan

<!-- What did you do to verify this works? -->
- [ ] `swift test`
- [ ] Tested against a real-world GPX file (please attach if non-trivial)
